CREATE TABLE xml_test (id INTEGER, xml_data XML);
SELECT xml_data.getSchemaURL() FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xml_data.getSchemaURL() FROM xml_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT xml_data.getSchemaURL() FROM (SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
SELECT x.id, x.xml_data.getSchemaURL() FROM xml_test x JOIN (SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1) AS j ON x.id = j.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_test WHERE xml_data.getSchemaURL() IS NOT NULL;
WITH xml_schema AS (SELECT xml_data.getSchemaURL() AS schema_url FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1) SELECT * FROM xml_schema;
SELECT xml_data.getSchemaURL() FROM xml_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE xml_data.getSchemaURL() IS NOT NULL);
SELECT x.id, x.xml_data.getSchemaURL() FROM xml_test x LEFT JOIN (SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE id > 1) AS j ON x.id = j.id;
CREATE TABLE xml_composite (id INTEGER, xml_data XML, parent_id INTEGER);
INSERT INTO xml_composite VALUES (1, XMLType('<parent />', 'file://xmlschema/test0002/parent.xsd'), NULL);
SELECT p.xml_data.getSchemaURL(), c.xml_data.getSchemaURL() FROM xml_composite p JOIN xml_composite c ON p.id = c.parent_id;
SELECT xml_data.getSchemaURL() FROM (SELECT xml_data FROM xml_composite WHERE parent_id IS NULL) AS parent_query;
